head_scope: current app recognizer classes plus machine-readable signal capture

tests.expected: RECLAIMED should be allowed to complete the two-close INVERTED transition
tests.consequence: The FVG detector marks the level DEAD on the first beyond-edge close, so the LevelEngine cannot complete INVERTED and normal pipeline execution cannot emit IFVG.
Any recent SWEPT transition, including an unrelated M15 round number, upgrades an M5 CHOCH. Direction, swing ID, level kind and timeframe ancestry are not checked.

tests.expected: Store both pivot/origin time and causal confirmation time
tests.consequence: The pivot is causally created only after three right bars close, but Level stores only the old pivot timestamp. Parent-child lineage and restart reconstruction cannot tell when the swing became usable.

tests.expected: No OB without a displaced structure break tied to a known swing
tests.consequence: The baseline OB rule needs only opposite candle color plus net displacement. It can create an OB with no swing, BOS, liquidity event or parent identifier.
Session reset deliberately allows the same carried FVG to fire again, conflicting with a strict fresh/unvisited-POI strategy.

tests.expected: The first and last non-overlapping locations remain separate
tests.consequence: Single-link chaining lets intermediate evidence manufacture one wide confluence zone.
Any narrower overlapping level, even an unrelated M15 round number, can replace the scored zone. Detector, direction, timeframe and parent ID are ignored.

tests.expected: Confirmed important swing liquidity remains available until swept/invalidated
tests.consequence: Session pruning carries OB/FVG and selected liquidity kinds but deletes every SWING_H/SWING_L. The production tree cannot revisit prior-session swing liquidity.

tests.expected: No propulsion signal after its parent OB is DEAD/MITIGATED
tests.consequence: Propulsion state loses parent level_id/state, so a child can fire after the parent thesis is invalid.

tests.expected: Opposing gaps must identify compatible parents/leg before directional BPR
tests.consequence: Any live bull/bear FVG overlap can fire; newer birth time chooses direction. No shared swing, displacement leg, timeframe or parent thesis is required.

tests.expected: Each implementation emits and mutates only its own zones
tests.consequence: Shared LevelKind values have no producer field. Generic FVG/OB can claim the alternative detector's zone, corrupting attribution and apparent confluence.

capture_density.provenance_warning: This capture is a raw-detector research artifact, not current production trades.

summary.unit_suite_note: The repository's 782 tests pass; these are cross-component SMC-lineage invariants absent from that suite.
